title: Rename 'Assis Tech' to 'Assis Technician' and update PDF layout to mirror app theme

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx, rename all visible labels, placeholders, and aria labels that currently read 'Assis Tech' or 'ASSIS TECH' to 'Assis Technician' or 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN' respectively. The input field for this personnel entry and its section heading must display 'Assis Technician'.
acceptanceCriteria: The personnel input field label reads 'Assis Technician' (not 'Assis Tech' or 'Helper')
The placeholder text for that input reads 'Assis Technician' or similar
Any section heading that previously displayed 'ASSIS TECH' now displays 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN'
No remaining instances of 'Assis Tech' or 'ASSIS TECH' appear in the form UI

requirements.text: In frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts, update the generateReportPDF function to display the label 'Assis Technician:' (instead of 'Assis Tech:') in the PDF output for the assistTech field. The ReportData interface property name 'assistTech' remains unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: The generated PDF report displays 'Assis Technician:' as the label for this field
No instance of 'Assis Tech:' or 'Helper:' appears in the PDF output
The ReportData interface 'assistTech' property name is unchanged

requirements.text: Update the PDF layout in frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts to visually mirror the app's industrial dark-theme aesthetic in terms of layout, typography, and spacing — without changing the existing color values. Specifically: use bold, wide-tracked uppercase typography for section headings (matching the app's Oswald/bold heading style); increase whitespace and padding around section blocks to match the app's card-based section layout; render field label-value pairs in a structured two-column or clearly separated format with consistent line spacing; apply visible horizontal divider lines between sections to mirror the app's section dividers; ensure the PDF header block ('SECURITY ENGINEERING INC.' / 'Daily Field Report') uses bold large type for the company name and a smaller subtitle line, matching the app header hierarchy. Do not alter any color values currently used in the PDF.

quotes: Make PDF display theme similar to app replay theme without color change.

acceptanceCriteria: PDF section headings use bold, uppercase, wider-tracked typography consistent with the app's heading style
Horizontal divider lines appear between PDF sections, mirroring the app's card/section dividers
Field label-value pairs are consistently spaced and clearly separated throughout the PDF
The PDF header displays 'SECURITY ENGINEERING INC.' in large bold type and 'Daily Field Report' as a smaller subtitle
Padding/margins around sections in the PDF reflect the structured card-like layout of the app
No color values in the PDF output are changed from their current state

constraints: Do not change any color values in the PDF output
Do not rename the 'assistTech' property in the ReportData interface
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Changing PDF background or text colors
Modifying the app UI color theme
Adding new form fields or PDF sections
Changing any other field labels besides 'Assis Tech' → 'Assis Technician'
